title: boehmeria excelsa
intro: Boehmeria excelsa, also known as Renga Renga or New Zealand nettle, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds such as flavonoids, triterpenoids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Boehmeria excelsa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health, making it a valuable herbal remedy for addressing a range of health concerns. Boehmeria excelsa is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
